[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 1101000 3
3 0001101 3
4 1010110 4
5 0011111 5
6 1111100 5
7 0001110 3

01 10 0001000 1
12 21 0000100 1
23 32 0010110 3
34 43 0011100 3
45 54 0001100 2
56 65 0000000 a match 0 1
67 76 0000000 a match 0 1
70 07 0100000 1

02 20 1000000 1
13 31 0001101 3 match 3
24 42 1010100 3
35 53 0001110 3 match 7

57 75 0000010 1

71 17 0000001 1

14 41 0001100 2

36 63 0000000 a match 0 1
47 74 0100000 1

61 16 0000000 a match 0 1
72 27 0000010 1
